status.description: ID of status to set; null to clear

field_name.description: Short code / action (e.g. created, assigned, updated)

allowed_statuses.description: Allowed next statuses according to issue_work_flow for this issue's type and current status

data.description: Unified payload describing initiator, target entity and content change/value.

content.description: Either { before, after } for changed values or { value } for single-value events.

Material.description: Material or equipment record from equipment_materials table

MaterialCreate.description: Request body for creating/updating an equipment_materials record

shipments.description: Shipment links — array of IDs or { shipment_id } objects. On update fully resynchronizes links.

MaterialUpdate.description: Request body for partial update of an equipment_materials record

shipments.description: Shipment links - array of IDs or { shipment_id } objects. On update fully resynchronizes links.

updated_by.description: User ID who updated the record

MaterialsDirectoryCreate.description: Request body for creating/updating an equipment_materials_directories record (server generates `path`)

ShipmentStorageFile.description: File attached to shipment via shipments_storage

StatementCreate.description: Request body for creating/updating a statement

Stage.description: Project stage — record from stages table

StageCreate.description: Request body for creating a stage

SpecificationCreate.description: Request body for creating a specification

example.description: General cargo vessel for bulk shipments

get.description: Searches across documents, issues and customer questions including related messages, files and links. Results are filtered by user permissions and project scope.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Project id or comma-separated list of project ids

get.summary: Documents statistics grouped by specialization and stage

post.summary: Bulk update status for document files
post.description: Update `status_id` for multiple storage entries linked to documents. Body: { storage_ids: [1,2], status: <id|null> }

get.description: Returns a list of units with optional text search by name. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new unit. Required field: name.

get.description: Returns a single unit record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of a unit. Only changed fields are passed (name, code, symbol, description, kei).

delete.description: Soft-delete of unit (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Returns a list of equipment_materials records filtered by directory, unit, shipment, type, status, and text search. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: shipment_id
parameters.description: Filter by shipment ID (via shipment_materials relation)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new equipment_materials record. Required fields: name, directory_id. stock_code is auto-generated (NR + 14 digits) if not provided. Optionally, shipments can be passed for linking. On stock_code conflict, automatically retries up to 5 times.

get.description: Returns a single equipment_materials record by identifier. Response contains nested objects directory, unit, created_by, updated_by and array shipment_materials.

put.description: Partial update of an equipment_materials record. Only changed fields are passed. Optionally, shipments can be passed to resynchronize links (full replacement).

delete.description: Soft-delete of material (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Returns a list of equipment_materials_directories records with text search by name. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new equipment_materials_directories record. Required field: name.

get.description: Returns a single equipment_materials_directories record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of an equipment_materials_directories record. Only changed fields are passed.

delete.description: Soft-delete of directory (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Returns a list of shipments filtered by supplier and text search. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new shipment record. All fields are optional.

get.description: Returns a single shipment record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of a shipment. Only changed fields are passed.

delete.description: Soft-delete of shipment (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

post.description: Attaches an existing storage file to a shipment, or uploads a multipart file and attaches it.

404.description: Shipment or storage item not found

get.description: Returns files attached to a shipment through shipments_storage.

post.summary: Upload local file and attach to shipment

get.description: View audit log records. Requires appropriate permissions.

post.description:
Authenticates a user by username or email and password; returns user information.

After successful login the server sets HttpOnly cookies: `access_token` (JWT access token) and `refresh_token`. Tokens are not returned in the response body — they are delivered via HttpOnly cookies. The response body contains only `expires_at` and `user`.
Deactivates the current session / refresh token. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile.

post.description:
Refreshes access token using the refresh token. The refresh token must be sent in an HttpOnly cookie named `refresh_token`.

New tokens are delivered via HttpOnly cookies; the response body contains only `expires_at` and `user`.
Sends an email with password reset instructions if the email exists. The response does not reveal whether the address exists.
Sets a new password for the account using a valid recovery token.

get.description: Returns environment settings available to the current user.

patch.description: Updates multiple environment settings and reports whether a restart is required.

Returns customer_question_work_flow records. Requires customer_questions.view permission.

Get documents storage status by ID

Returns a document_type record by ID.

parameters.name: created_by
parameters.description: ID of the user who created the document

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Return documents created before this date (RFC3339)

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Return documents created after this date (RFC3339)

get.x-example-request:
# Example request
GET /api/documents?project_id=12&search=pipe&page=1&limit=20 HTTP/1.1
Host: {{baseUrl}}
Authorization: Bearer <your-jwt-token>

# Query parameter descriptions:
# - project_id: project ID
# - search: search by title/description
# - page, limit: pagination

404.description: Document or storage item not found
Document or attached storage item not found

404.description: Document or storage item not found

Returns document messages (comments). Requires documents.view permission.
Returns a list of equipment filtered by project, supplier, status, and text search. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new equipment record. Required fields: equipment_code, name, sfi_code_id.

get.description: Returns a single equipment record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of an equipment record. Only changed fields are passed.

delete.description: Soft-delete of equipment record (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Returns all issue_status records. Requires issues.view permission.

Returns an issue_type record by ID. Requires issues.view permission.

parameters.description: Filter by closed status (true = closed, false = not closed)

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Project ID — multiple values allowed (comma-separated or repeated parameter)

parameters.name: status_id
parameters.description: Status ID — multiple values allowed (comma-separated or repeated parameter)

parameters.description: Assignee user ID — multiple values allowed

parameters.description: Issue type ID — multiple values allowed

parameters.description: Priority code — multiple values allowed (e.g. low,medium)

parameters.name: my_issue
parameters.description: Return only issues belonging to the current user (author OR assignee). Value: true/false

post.description: Assign user as issue assignee. Request body: { assignee_id: <int|null> } — pass null to unassign. Requires issues.update permission.

404.description: Issue or storage item not found

post.description: Uploads a multipart file to local storage and immediately attaches it to the issue.

get.description: Returns all job titles (id, name). Requires job_titles.view permission.

delete.description: Deletes a job title record.

get.description: Returns entity_links records matching the specified filters.

parameters.name: relation_type
parameters.description: Multiple values can be separated by commas

delete.description: Deletes an entity link by ID.

get.description: Returns the next available stock_code for materials. Format: NR + 14 digits. Calculated as MAX of current code + 1.
Returns a list of suppliers filtered by activity, country, and text search. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.description: Search by name, description and code (ILIKE)

post.description: Creates a new supplier. Required field: name.

get.description: Returns a single supplier record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of a supplier. Only changed fields are passed.

delete.description: Soft-delete of supplier (is_active = false).

get.description: Returns list of notification events.

post.description: Creates a page_permissions record.

get.description: Returns page_permissions records. Can be filtered by page_id.

delete.summary: Delete all page permission links for a page
delete.description: Deletes all page_permissions records for the specified page and returns the count of deleted records.

post.description: Creates a new page.

get.description: Returns pages with aggregated permissions.

delete.description: Deletes a page.

get.description: Returns projects the current user is assigned to. Authentication required, no additional permissions needed.

delete.description: Removes a user assignment from a project. Parameters sent in request body: user_id and optional role or roles.

user_id.description: User ID to unassign. Can be an integer, array of integers, or CSV string (e.g. "34,55"). The controller supports all three formats.

role_id.description: Role ID to remove (if specified — removes only this role)

roles.description: Array of role IDs to remove

get.description: Returns users assigned to the project with their roles and assignment dates.

post.description: Assign a user to a project. Provide `project_id` and `user_id` in the request body. Optionally include `role` (string) to indicate desired role name; the system will create or use the global role and map it via `user_roles`.

user_id.description: User ID for assignment. Can be an integer, array of integers, or CSV string (e.g. "34,55"). The controller supports all three formats.

role_id.description: Optional single role id. If provided the role id will be assigned to user in project.

roles.description: Optional array of role IDs to assign (e.g. [4, 5]). If provided, each role will be assigned.

post.description: Assign a permission to a role. Requires roles.update.

get.description: Returns permissions linked to a role. Requires roles.view permission.

delete.description: Removes a permission from a role. Requires roles.update.

get.description: Returns permissions for a role by role_id query parameter (fallback endpoint). Requires roles.view.

post.summary: Assign global role(s) to a user
post.description: Assign one or more global roles to a user (stored in user_roles with project_id = NULL). Requires roles.update.

delete.summary: Unassign global role(s) from a user
delete.description: Remove one or more global roles from a user (project_id = NULL). If roles omitted, removes all global roles for the user. Requires roles.update.

role_ids.description: Array of role ids to remove

post.description: Creates a new specialization. Requires users.create permission.

get.description: Returns all specializations. Requires users.view permission.

put.description: Updates a specialization. Requires users.update permission.

delete.description: Deletes a specialization. Requires users.delete permission.

get.description: Returns a specialization by ID. Requires users.view permission.
Returns a list of specifications filtered by project_id and text search. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new specification. Required fields: project_id, name. If version is specified, a record is also created in specification_version.

get.description: Returns a single specification record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of a specification. Changeable fields: document_id, code, name, description, version. If version changes, a new record is created in specification_version.

delete.description: Soft-delete of specification (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Returns a list of project stages filtered by project_id and text search. Sorted by order_index. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new project stage. Required fields: project_id, name, end_date.

get.description: Returns a single stage record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of a stage. Changeable fields: name, code, description, end_date, order_index.

delete.description: Soft-delete of stage (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Returns a list of statements with text search by name and description. Pagination via page/limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Records per page (if not specified — no limit)

post.description: Creates a new statement. Required field: name.

get.description: Returns a single statement record by identifier.

put.description: Partial update of a statement. Only changed fields are passed: parent_id, project_id, code, name, description.

delete.description: Soft-delete of statement (is_active = false). If not possible — full deletion.

get.description: Download/stream a file from storage. Local files are streamed, S3 files redirect to URL.

post.summary: Download multiple files in a ZIP archive

post.description: Create a new user in the system

username.description: Unique username. If not provided, it will be automatically derived from the email prefix (alias) and appended with a numeric suffix if needed for uniqueness.

application/json.description: Password is optional: if omitted a secure password will be generated and sent to the user's email

409.description: Conflict - user with such data already exists

get.description: Returns menu pages available to the current user based on their permissions and roles.

put.description: Update profile fields for the currently authenticated user. Allows updating email, phone, first_name, last_name, middle_name, and rocket_login (rocket_login is applied to the Rocket.Chat mapping). Authentication required.

get.description: Returns a paginated user list. Requires users.view permission.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status (true|false). Accepts 'true'/'false' or '1'/'0'.

put.description: Partial user update. Requires users.update permission.

400.description: Invalid user id or bad payload

delete.description: Marks user as inactive. Requires users.delete permission.

get.description: Returns a user by ID. Requires users.view permission.

post.description: Upload avatar for the currently authenticated user. Accepts multipart/form-data with field 'file'. Stores file in S3 (under optional `directory`/`subdir`, default 'avatars') and updates user's avatar_id (stores reference to a `storage` record).

directory.description: Optional directory/prefix to store avatar under (default: 'avatars')

get.description: Aggregated counts for the current authenticated user's projects, issues, documents and customer questions.
Returns user notifications. Hidden notifications are excluded by default.
Returns notifications for the authenticated user. Hidden notifications are excluded by default.

post.description: Marks the notification as hidden (excluded from the default list).
Marks the specified notification as read for the user.

get.description: Returns the count of unread and visible notifications for the user.

post.description: Creates or updates the mapping between a user and a Rocket.Chat account. Requires users.update permission.

400.description: Invalid user id or bad payload

delete.description: Deletes the user-to-Rocket.Chat mapping. Requires users.delete permission.

get.description: Returns the mapping between the app user and Rocket.Chat account. Requires users.view permission.

post.summary: Send invitation emails to multiple users
post.description: Sends the `user_created` email template to a list of existing users. Body must contain `user_ids` array.
Creates or updates a notification setting (project-specific or global) for the user.

delete.description: Deletes a setting by composite key (project_id, event_id, method_id). For global settings pass project_id = null.

get.description: Returns notification settings for the current user. Pass project_id in query to filter by project.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Optional project id to filter settings

post.summary: Send password reset emails to multiple users
post.description: Creates password reset tokens and sends reset emails to the provided user ids.
